title: Smart Vertical Axis Wind Turbine
subtitle: Kinetic harvesting with automatic dark-activated indicator
desc: Build an omnidirectional wind turbine that generates power and senses ambient light!
fullDesc: Build a functional Vertical Axis Wind Turbine (VAWT) using a Savonius rotor to drive a DC dynamo motor generator, paired with a BC547 transistor circuit that automatically triggers an indicator when night falls...
author: Siddharth
innovation: An omnidirectional wind harvester integrated with an automatic light-sensing emergency load circuit for school yard applications.
problemStatement: Standard clean energy setups require manual switching or expensive digital controllers to manage stored energy or trigger night indicators.
solutionApproach: Utilized a high-efficiency vertical drag rotor coupled with a DC dynamo motor to harvest wind energy into a DC battery bank. Integrated an analog BC547 NPN transistor switching circuit with an LDR to automatically engage low-power indicators based on ambient light conditions.

hardwareSpecs.powerConsumption: Idle: ~0.5mA, Active Generation: Variable based on wind speed

guide: Assemble the vertical rotor blades onto the central shaft and couple it directly to the axle of the DC dynamo motor.
Connect the positive output of the dynamo motor through a protection diode to the positive terminal of the DC Battery to store generated power safely.
Place the BC547 NPN transistor on the breadboard (Pins: Emitter, Base, Collector).
Connect the 100kΩ resistor from the positive battery rail to the Base pin of the BC547 transistor.
Connect the LDR sensor between the Base pin of the BC547 transistor and the Ground/Negative battery rail to form a voltage divider.
Connect an indicator LED (with appropriate current resistor) or secondary load from the Positive rail to the Collector pin of the transistor.
Connect the Emitter pin of the BC547 directly to the Ground/Negative rail.
Spin the wind turbine to confirm battery charging, and cover the LDR sensor to test the automatic dark-activated switching mechanism.

codeFiles.name: vawt-hybrid-generator.ino
codeFiles.desc: Default sketch for Smart Vertical Axis Wind Turbine

youtubeVideos.title: Smart VAWT Project Demo
